use_cases: Showcasing available SVG fill patterns for data visualization charts
Providing decorative pattern options for UI backgrounds
Creating chart components with patterned bars and elements
Building a pattern library for design systems
ai_summary: A pattern showcase component demonstrating various SVG pattern types including lines, circles, waves, and diagonal orientations using the @visx/pattern library. Features multiple pattern variations with configurable orientations, sizes, and stroke properties. Includes accessibility support through prefersReducedMotion for animated patterns. Used primarily for data visualization decorative elements and design system pattern libraries.
